desc.en: Master relative clauses — the backbone of English sentences
desc.zh: 学会识别和使用定语从句——英语句子的骨架
desc.es: Domina las cláusulas relativas — la columna vertebral del inglés

desc.en: Master in/on/at for place and time
desc.zh: 掌握 in/on/at 的空间和时间用法
desc.es: Domina in/on/at para lugar y tiempo

s.en: Can you spot the relative clause?
s.zh: Can you spot the relative clause?

d.en: Find the relative clause in each sentence

q.en:
下面哪个部分是定语从句？

下面哪个部分是定语从句？

name.zh: In / On / At — 空间介词

d.en: in = inside, on = surface, at = specific point
d.zh: in = inside, on = surface, at = specific point
d.es: in = dentro, on = superficie, at = punto específico
